3D Brownian Motion Simulation

Interactive WebGL rendering of a 3D random walk. Seed: 100 | Steps: 1000 / 1000

◀ Return to Simulation Gallery

💡 Interactive Controls

  • Left Click + Drag: Rotate the 3D space
  • Right Click + Drag: Pan across the canvas
  • Scroll Wheel: Zoom in and out
  • Slider (Bottom of Plot): Drag to scrub through simulation time

⚙️ Simulation Params

Steps: 1000 | dt: 0.1 | σ: 1.5

StableRNG Seed: 100

The trajectory color transitions from purple/blue (start) to yellow/red (end), representing temporal progression.

Generated with Julia, WGLMakie.jl, and Bonito.jl
